name: Carrot Muffins (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees F. In a large bowl, combine grated carrots, milk, orange juice, and beaten eggs. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, cornmeal, baking powder, sugar, and salt. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the carrot mixture. Stir in the melted butter. Pour the batter evenly into greased muffin tins. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
